title: helichrysum hedbergianum
intro: Helichrysum hedbergianum, also known as the yellow fever tree, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its essential oil, which contains sesquiterpenes and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum hedbergianum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving wound healing, and supporting liver health, among others. The herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, extracts, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to promote overall well-being.
